untranslatable_reason: Signal requires three entry conditions: (1) Order flow dominance >65%, (2) Price deviation >2.5 std from 20-MA, and (3) Bid-ask spread widening >40%. Available indicators cannot directly measure bid-ask spread dynamics or order flow directional imbalance. Used vol_ratio_20 and price_pos_20 as proxies but these do not capture the microstructure mechanics (dealer inventory, adverse selection inference, spread widening) specified in the original signal.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using vol_ratio_20 (volume concentration) and price_pos_20 (deviation from 20-period MA in standard deviations). However, the signal's core logic depends on order flow microstructure, bid-ask spread mechanics, and dealer inventory inference—none of which are available in the allowed indicator set. The spread widening condition (>40% above baseline) cannot be expressed without bid-ask spread data.
